text:
PH = 
Patient medication history 
PM = 
Patient monitoring 
P0 = 
Patient consulted 
PT = 
Perform laboratory test 
R0 = 
Pharmacist consulted other source 
RT = 
Recommend laboratory test 
SC = 
Self-care consultation 
SW = 
Literature search/review 
TC = 
Payer/processor consulted 
TH = 
Therapeutic product interchange 
COMMENT: 
This Professional Service Code is data element 440-E5 of the NCPDP data dictionary. It is one of three 
fields concatenated into the drug utilization code field
